steps.title: Rewrite line l
steps.content:
Put the equation in slope-intercept form.
$$5y+25x=8$$
$$5y=-25x+8$$
$$y=-5x+\frac{8}{5}$$
Line $l$ has slope $-5$.

steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
A perpendicular slope is the negative reciprocal of the original slope.
$$-\frac{1}{-5}=\frac{1}{5}=0.2$$
The answer is 0.2.
